sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85138" key="poluo/mfalos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολυ-όμφᾰλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n85138.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with many bosses</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shields,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πεδίον π.,</foreign> of the Roman <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">testudo,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:218" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.218</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
